description: Resistor — limits current, sets voltage dividers, pull-up/down, current sense
common_mistakes: Power rating: P = I² × R — always verify resistor wattage is not exceeded
Pull-up/down value too low wastes current; too high causes slow edge transitions
Current limiting resistor for LED: R = (VCC - V_LED) / I_LED
notes: Value in Ohms (Ω). Standard E24/E96 series. Mark value and tolerance on schematic.
